## UI Screenshots

> **Required for any change that touches the UI (HTML, CSS, or client-side JS).**
> 
> Screenshots must be committed to this repository in a PR-specific directory:
> **`docs/screenshots/PR-<NUMBER>-<short-description>/`**
>
> Steps:
> 1. Create the directory: `mkdir docs/screenshots/PR-<NUMBER>-<description>`
> 2. Copy the template: `cp docs/screenshots/_TEMPLATE/README.md docs/screenshots/PR-<NUMBER>-<description>/`
> 3. Add your screenshots and update the README with your PR number and link
> 4. Reference them below using relative paths
>
> See [docs/screenshots/README.md](../docs/screenshots/README.md) for full instructions and [docs/screenshots/PR-GUIDE.md](../docs/screenshots/PR-GUIDE.md) for embedding tips.
>
> If this PR has no UI impact, replace this section with: _No UI changes._

### Before

<!-- 
Paste a screenshot of the UI **before** this change, or write "N/A – new feature" if there was no previous state.

Example:
![Before](docs/screenshots/PR-<NUMBER>-<description>/before.png)
-->

### After

Example:

- [ ] Code follows the existing style and conventions
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] PR title is clear and descriptive
- [ ] Screenshots committed to `docs/screenshots/PR-<NUMBER>-<description>/` (if UI changes)
